mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_group (group_id, user_id) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, group_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at, COUNT(ug_all.user_id)::integer AS member_count FROM groups g INNER JOIN user_group ug ON ug.group_id = g.group_id AND ug.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN user_group ug_all ON ug_all.group_id = g.group_id GROUP BY g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at ORDER BY ug.joined_at DESC, g.group_id DESC

SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at, COUNT(ug_all.user_id)::integer AS member_count FROM groups g INNER JOIN user_group ug ON ug.group_id = g.group_id AND ug.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN user_group ug_all ON ug_all.group_id = g.group_id WHERE g.group_id = #{groupId} GROUP BY g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at
